sourcePage.rawText:
17   The ceiling of x, written ⌈ x ⌉, is defined to be the value of x rounded up to the nearest integer.

     For example: ⌈ π ⌉ = 4,     ⌈ 2.1 ⌉ = 3,   ⌈8 ⌉ = 8

     What is the value of the following integral?

                                                    99
                                                    ∫ 2 dx
                                                           ⎡⎢ x ⎤⎥
                                                    0


     A   299

     B   299 – 1

     C   299 – 2

     D   2100

     E   2100 – 1

     F   2100 – 2




                                                    19

stem.rawText:
The ceiling of x, written ⌈ x ⌉, is defined to be the value of x rounded up to the nearest integer.

     For example: ⌈ π ⌉ = 4,     ⌈ 2.1 ⌉ = 3,   ⌈8 ⌉ = 8

     What is the value of the following integral?

                                                    99
                                                    ∫ 2 dx
                                                           ⎡⎢ x ⎤⎥
                                                    0

solution.rawText:
The value of 2dxe changes at every integer. We have
                                      
                                      
                                      
                                       20 when x = 0
                                        21 when 0 < x ≤ 1
                                      
                                      
                                      
                                      
                                      
                                      22 when 1 < x ≤ 2
                                      
                               2dxe =
                                      
                                      
                                       23 when 2 < x ≤ 3
                                      
                                      
                                      
                                      
                                       ...
                                      299 when 98 < x ≤ 99
                                      


We therefore break the integral up into unit intervals. The value of 2dxe at the endpoints does
not influence the value of the integral, so we have
            Z 99           Z 1            Z 2           Z 3                  Z 99
                  dxe            dxe           dxe           dxe
                 2 dx =        2 dx +         2 dx +        2 dx + · · · +        2dxe dx
              0              0             1             2                     98
                           Z 1          Z 2         Z 3                 Z 99
                         =     21 dx +      22 dx +     23 dx + · · · +      299 dx
                              0            1           2                98
                        = 21 + 22 + 23 + · · · + 299

as the integral of a constant is just the constant times the interval width. We now have a
geometric series with first term a = 2, common ratio r = 2 and n = 99 terms, so the sum is

                                  a(rn − 1)   21 (299 − 1)
                                            =              = 2100 − 2
                                    r−1           2−1
which is option F.
